title: Review retained LAN listener necessity
goal: Decide whether retained Heim-PC LAN-facing services such as UniFi, Sunshine, GNOME Remote Desktop and Avahi are still needed, then narrow or disable only services with a documented consumer, recovery path and reviewed effect.

acceptance.assertion: Each retained LAN listener has a current consumer, purpose, access scope, startup owner and consequence of disabling.
Services without a current consumer are proposed for disablement; services with a consumer are narrowed to the smallest viable interface or network where supported.
Every change has a pre-state record, rollback command and post-change functional proof for the dependent workflow.
No service is disabled merely because it is old, detached, noisy or unfamiliar; uncertainty retains the service and creates a specific evidence gap.
Infra listener evidence is updated after reviewed effects or records a no-change decision with rationale.

metadata.outcome: Reviewed UniFi, Sunshine, GNOME Remote Desktop and Avahi against live consumers. All four are retained; no service or binding was changed. Sunshine UPnP is disabled. Unsupported ingress claims remain UNVERIFIED in Infra runtime.

validated_acceptance.consumer-map: GNOME RDP had recent sessions on 2026-07-09/10; Sunshine was active with autostart and _nvstream discovery; UniFi controller and logs were current; Avahi served Sunshine and cups-browsed discovery.
validated_acceptance.least-exposure: No listener lacked a current consumer. Sunshine configuration explicitly records upnp=disabled. Further interface narrowing was not proven safe while host-firewall truth remains blocked.
validated_acceptance.recovery: No runtime mutation was applied, so no rollback action was required. The no-change decision and pre-state hashes are recorded.
validated_acceptance.no-blind-disable: Unknown authenticated UniFi device count was retained as an evidence gap rather than converted into an unused-service claim.
validated_acceptance.runtime-update: Infra PR #120 records the reviewed no-change decision and the remaining UNVERIFIED ingress boundaries.

ci_observation.reason: GitHub account payment/spending-limit block; no runner or test step started.
ci_observation.local_validation: make validate PASS on exact head a269a55b772a666996d6304e2c28109db3402b7b immediately before merge

metadata.self_review: PASS after correcting the decision.json digest and removing an unsupported UniFi version claim; exact PR diff, local evidence hashes, live container identity and no-change semantics were re-read before merge.
